The '''SFOR Republic carbine''' was used by the [[Galactic Republic/Legends|Galactic Republic]] in the [[Mandalorian Wars]] and the [[Jedi Civil War]]. It was a destructive [[Blaster carbine/Legends|carbine]] firing a rippling shockwave capable of tearing matter apart. During the [[Galactic Civil War/Legends|Galactic Civil War]], a number of these destructive, and by then outlawed carbines found their way into the hands of several [[Spacer/Legends|spacers]], treasure hunters and explorers on [[Mustafar/Legends|Mustafar]]. A group of [[Pirate/Legends|pirates]], settled on Mustafar, who called themselves the [[Coynite/Legends|Coynite]], modified a large number of SFOR Republic carbines, to cause an extreme temperature drop on the spot it hit, freezing the target. It was rumored that the Coynite got the SFOR Republic carbines from a crashed Old Republic cruiser that had just emerged from underground.

==Appearances==
*''[[Star Wars Galaxies: Trials of Obi-Wan]]'' {{1st}}
